title: 10 best herbal essential oils for baldness
description: Parsley essential oils helps with baldness because it promotes hair growth by stimulating blood flow to the scalp, nourishing the follicles, and balancing hormonal levels. Its anti-inflammatory properties also soothe an irritated scalp, reducing dandruff and itchiness that can contribute to hair loss.
